title: Cooler Copper Delight
description: Makes Cooler Copper compatible with Farmer's Delight
body:
**Cooler Copper Delight**

Cooler Copper Delight makes Cooler Copper compatible with the popular farming mod, Farmer's Delight by adding a brand new item to the game: the copper knife! This is extremely useful in early game when you want to make exciting foods but do not have the resources to make an expensive knife.
